title: ElementalCraft By Hugo
description: An Elements Mod with new tools, new ores and more
body:
Mod Story:

I conceived and developed this mod after not finding any other ElementalCraft mod that met my expectations. Determined to create a unique experience, I delved into the creation of this mod, bringing a variety of exciting elements and thrilling mechanics to Minecraft players.

Key Features:

This mod is a celebration of fun and adventure, packed with new content that will surely captivate your imagination. Here's what you can expect to find:

New Ores: Discover and explore new ores filled with unique properties, offering exciting opportunities for crafting and equipment enhancement.

New Swords: Equip yourself with new and powerful swords, each with special abilities that can be triggered during combat, making battles even more dynamic and challenging.

New Dimensions: Venture into new dimensions full of mysteries and dangers. Explore unique landscapes, find hidden treasures, and face epic challenges as you venture into these unknown worlds.

New Mobs: Encounter fascinating and dangerous creatures that inhabit the lands of this mod. From formidable monsters to mystical creatures, each encounter promises an exciting and unforgettable experience.

Made for Fun:

This mod was developed with passion and dedication, aiming to provide moments of fun and entertainment for all Minecraft players. Whether battling fearsome mobs, exploring new places, or simply enjoying the new possibilities this mod offers, you're sure to find something to love in this world of Elements.

Developer's Note:

Developed with MCreator and with much care by NPC_Hugo, this mod is an expression of my love for the Minecraft community and for creating engaging experiences for players.
